title: Player Death Location
description: Player Death Location: Shows your death coordinates in chat and on the death screen with easy teleport and copy options.
body:
## 🧭 Player Death Location
Never lose your death spot again!
Player Death Location shows the exact coordinates where you died — right in the chat and on the death screen — with a clickable teleport command and copyable text.

### 🔧 Features
✅ Automatically shows death coordinates on screen and in chat

📍 Click to copy or teleport (with command permissions)

🔄 Toggle on/off with simple commands

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer

⚙️ Lightweight, Fabric-compatible

# 🌐 Links
🎥 YouTube: [@Shirjeel_plays](https://www.youtube.com/@Shirjeel_plays)

💬 Discord: [Join My Server](https://discord.com/invite/2tBJYsSyap)

🧠 My Website: [MineSpark](https://www.minespark.wuaze.com/)

## 💡 Quick Tip
Use the command:

/deathpoints on
/deathpoints off

To turn the feature on or off whenever you like!
